🎯 Budget Coach — Learn to Cap Your Spending
Capping a category teaches your brain to spend with intention — not on autopilot. These caps are picked by the AI from your monthly missions and last 30 days of spending. Tap any cap to see what it learns about you, and which missions help you hit it.
Generates personalized spending caps based on what you've actually been spending and what your missions are pushing you toward. Click New Caps to start.

Transactions & Spending
🔗 Live Bank Sync (Plaid via Pi)
Checking Pi server...
● Not connected

Your Plaid credentials live on your home Pi server — never in this app, never in the cloud. Your bank data flows Pi → this app, fully private.

Click below to securely link your bank. The Pi server handles the Plaid handshake. Your bank password is entered directly into Plaid's secure popup — not into this app.
Upload Bank Statement

Download your transaction history as CSV from your bank and upload it here. The AI will read and categorize everything automatically - and if your statement has card numbers, it will route each transaction to the right person based on your card registry below.

💳 Card Registry
Tell the AI which card belongs to whom by the last 4 digits. The AI will then auto-route each transaction in your CSV to the correct person - even if you upload both cards in one file.
belongs to
Transactions without a card number visible in the CSV will be tagged to this account.

Behavior Lens
Spending & Income Chronicle
What is the Behavior Lens?

This is your money behavior scrying mirror. Pick a month, pick a person, and see the truth of where the gold flowed and where it leaked. The patterns you find here are the patterns you can change.

Pick a month to read its chronicle
Pick a person — you, your partner, or the household
See the breakdown of income and where the gold went
Ask the seer — AI reads the patterns and gives counsel
✦ What to look for
  • Repeat merchants — if you visited a place 10+ times this month, that's a habit (not a treat anymore). Decide if it's worth it.
  • Which category dominates? — healthy households have rent/food at the top. If "Shopping" or "Food & Dining" outranks rent, something's leaking.
  • Compare yourself to your partner — not to judge, but to understand. Who handles what? Is the split fair?
  • Look at avg purchase size — lots of small purchases adds up faster than a few big ones. $5 here, $8 there = $200/month vanished.
  • Track month-to-month — flip between months. Are categories trending up? That's where to focus next.
  • Net at the top — if it's red, you spent more than you earned. Honest, no judgment. Just data.
Fixes vague categories like "Other" or "Shopping" misfires — uses the latest AI rules for restaurants, gas, etc.
Planned Purchases
Treasure Chest — Save without surprise
What this is for

Got something on reserve, a big bill coming, or a purchase you're planning? Add it here. The system calculates how much you'd need to set aside each month to absorb it comfortably — so when it finally lands, you're not pushed against the wall.

People & Accounts
👥
Everyone whose money this app tracks. Assign debts, bills, and income to the right person. Mark owners as Personal or Business to keep finances separated.
Edit Owners

Click the color dot to cycle colors. Click Personal or Business to toggle the type. Me, Husband, and Joint can be renamed but not removed.

Removing an owner reassigns their debts and bills to Me.
⚔ Character Profiles
🎮
Each person levels up by handling their finances. Personal bills earn full XP for their owner; joint bills are split 50/50, and together you power the Household Guild.
🏆 Reward History ▾
📄
Every task that earned XP or gold, in order. Click a character chip above to filter.
📄 Character Sheets
⚖
The AI reads your transaction history and assigns RPG stats, attributes, a job class, and skill levels - based on how you actually spend and save. You can override any stat.
🤖 AI Spending Coach
📊
The AI reads each person's card spending and finds patterns, then suggests quests and rewards tailored to them. Transactions are matched to each owner by which card/account they came from.
Monthly Spending Budget
🎯
Know exactly how much is safe to spend every day this month - so you never accidentally overspend before the bills are paid.

No saved data found

If you have a backup file from a previous session, load it now to restore all your debts and history. Otherwise start fresh.

Tip: If you have a backup file, load it now. Going forward use Export → Save backup regularly so your data is always recoverable.
Saved

Clear all saved data?

This will permanently delete your debts, payments, budget info, and all settings. This cannot be undone.

Delete all transactions?

This removes all 0 transactions and can’t be undone. Your debts, bills, and manual log stay.
